Music Board

This is an interactive music board for your course. You may change the playlist, tracks, and descriptions as needed. Inspired by the Music Department.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Music Corner

A space for focus, reflection, and recommended listening.

Featured Playlist

Add a playlist link or embedded player below.

Playlist Title: Study Session Mix

Description: Instrumental tracks for reading, reflection, and concentration.

Edit Link Here

Copy and Paste Embedded Player Code Here using </>

Recommended Tracks

Track Title — Artist Name

Add audio notes via Insert Stuff

Track Title — Artist Name

Optional note about why this track is included.

Track Title — Artist Name

Add links or resources as needed.

You may delete any of these tracks at any time using backspace. To add more, simply insert a new track block via the editor </>. And copy paste the HTML:

<div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;background:#ffffff;"> <p style="margin:0 0 4px 0;"><strong>Track Title</strong> — Artist Name</p> <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">Optional note about why this track is included.</p> </div>

Music Videos to Explore:

  • Edit Link Here
  • Edit Link Here
  • Edit Link Here

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:



<section aria-label="Music Page"
  style="max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#313131;line-height:1.5;">

  <div style="border:1px solid #d9d9d9;border-radius:16px;padding:18px;background:#ffffff;">

    <header style="border-left:8px solid #cb4900;background:#f7f7f7;padding:14px 16px;border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:16px;">
      <h2 style="margin:0 0 4px 0;font-size:1.35rem;color:#313131;">Music Corner</h2>
      <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;">
        A space for focus, reflection, and recommended listening.
      </p>
    </header>

    <section style="margin-bottom:18px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;color:#313131;">Featured Playlist</h3>
      <p style="margin:0 0 10px 0;color:#4c4a4f;">
        Add a playlist link or embedded player below.
      </p>

      <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;background:#fafafa;">
        <p style="margin:0 0 8px 0;"><strong>Playlist Title:</strong> Study Session Mix</p>
        <p style="margin:0 0 8px 0;"><strong>Description:</strong> Instrumental tracks for reading, reflection, and concentration.</p>
        <p style="margin:0;">
          <a href="#" style="color:#cb4900;text-decoration:underline;">Edit Link Here</a>
        </p>
        <p>Copy and Paste Embedded Player Code Here using </></p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section style="margin-bottom:18px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;color:#313131;">Recommended Tracks</h3>

      <div style="display:grid;gap:10px;">
        <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;background:#ffffff;">
          <p style="margin:0 0 4px 0;"><strong>Track Title</strong> — Artist Name</p>
          <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">Add audio notes via Insert Stuff</p>
        </div>

        <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;background:#ffffff;">
          <p style="margin:0 0 4px 0;"><strong>Track Title</strong> — Artist Name</p>
          <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">Optional note about why this track is included.</p>
        </div>

        <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;background:#ffffff;">
          <p style="margin:0 0 4px 0;"><strong>Track Title</strong> — Artist Name</p>
          <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">Add links or resources as needed.</p>
        </div>
                
        



        

        <p><i>You may delete any of these tracks at any time using backspace. To add more, simply insert a new track block via the editor </>.
             And copy paste the HTML: </i></p>
             
             <p>
<code>
        <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;background:#ffffff;">
          <p style="margin:0 0 4px 0;"><strong>Track Title</strong> — Artist Name</p>
          <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">Optional note about why this track is included.</p>
        </div>
  
</code>
</p>
      
    </div >
    </section>

    <section>
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;color:#313131;">Music Videos to Explore:
      <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;background:#fafafa;">
        <ul style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;">
          <li><a href="#" style="color:#cb4900;text-decoration:underline;">Edit Link Here</a></li>
          <li><a href="#" style="color:#cb4900;text-decoration:underline;">Edit Link Here</a></li>
          <li><a href="#" style="color:#cb4900;text-decoration:underline;">Edit Link Here</a></li>

        </ul>
      </div>
    </section>
